summary: Add --model CLI flag and thread model selection through to SDK options for agent sessions
context: Benchmark run consumed ~848M Sonnet tokens in 69 hours before hitting Claude Max 20x weekly limit. Sonnet and Opus have separate usage pools. Need ability to select model per run to manage quota.
rationale: Added agentModel to BenchmarkConfig, --model to CLI, model field to AgentSessionOptions, and pass through to SDK options. Updated all model defaults from claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 to claude-sonnet-4-6. Model is recorded in run metadata for reproducibility.

alternatives.option: Set model via environment variable only
alternatives.reason_rejected: CLI flag is more discoverable and explicit. Env var ANTHROPIC_MODEL still works as fallback.
